description_long: This object is a classic lever-action shotgun featuring a long, cylindrical barrel with a wooden fore-end and a matching wooden full stock. The receiver and barrel are finished in a dark, likely blued metal, contrasting with the rich brown wood grain of the stock and fore-end. The lever loop is prominent beneath the receiver, indicating the action mechanism. The barrel is round and of medium length, with a simple front sight and no visible ribbing or venting. The trigger guard is integrated with the lever, forming an elongated oval shape. The overall design is reminiscent of traditional hunting or sporting shotguns, with a robust and utilitarian appearance.
description: A lever-action shotgun with a dark metal barrel and receiver, paired with a brown wooden full stock and fore-end. The lever loop and elongated trigger guard are prominent features.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, highlighting the wooden stock, fore-end, and the lever-action mechanism beneath the receiver.
description_view_1: Front-on view showing the circular barrel opening and the narrow profile of the shotgun, with the fore-end and stock barely visible.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, displaying the full length, wood grain, and lever-action mechanism from the other side.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the butt of the wooden stock and the narrow profile of the shotgun, with the barrel extending away from the viewer.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, round, no visible ribbing or venting
attribute_trigger_guard_design: elongated oval shape, integrated with the lever, medium size, no finger grooves or reinforcement
